response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, including C/C++ (used at National Instruments), but his recent career has focused heavily on web/mobile technologies (Node.js, TypeScript, React) and less on industrial automation or C++-heavy systems. His lack of recent C++-specific roles, minimal exposure to industrial protocols (e.g., OPC UA, Modbus), and no mention of IEC 62443 or cloud platforms (Azure) raises concerns about his fit for this role. However, his strong engineering background, open-source contributions, and secure development practices (TDD, CI/CD) demonstrate potential.
strengths: Strong C/C++ experience (early career at National Instruments, LabWindows/CVI)
Deep knowledge of secure development practices (TDD, CI/CD, SDLC)
Proven track record in high-performance systems (low-latency apps, real-time data handling)
concerns: Limited recent C++ development (last direct C++ role was 2014–2015)
No evident experience with industrial automation protocols (e.g., OPC UA, Modbus)
Lacks exposure to cloud platforms (Azure) or industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443)

key_factors.factor: Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) and cybersecurity standards
